rationale.R1.3: The agent thoroughly audited each claim against the evidence, identifying mislabeling of metrics and unsupported assertions.
rationale.RX.1: Uncertainty was disclosed for specific points but not comprehensively across all claims.
rationale.RX.3: The critique stayed within scope, addressing methodological issues without drifting.
rationale.RX.4: No harmful content introduced; identified potential harms in the original work.
rationale.RX.5: Provided some citations but lacked consistent annotation of changes.
